title: Udio Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for using Udio AI tool for everyday tasks.

commands.command: Summarise this in 3 bullet points
commands.description: Creates a concise summary in three main points.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand a long article quickly.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Simplifies complex text for easier understanding.
commands.scenario: When an email sounds too formal.

commands.command: Generate a list of ideas for a blog post
commands.description: Provides creative ideas for blog content.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck on what to write about.

commands.command: Translate this text to Spanish
commands.description: Translates text from English to Spanish.

commands.command: Create a to-do list from this text
commands.description: Extracts tasks and creates a to-do list.
commands.scenario: When you need to organize tasks from meeting notes.

commands.command: Explain this concept like I'm five
commands.description: Breaks down complex concepts into simple terms.
commands.scenario: When trying to understand a difficult topic.

commands.command: Correct grammar and spelling
commands.description: Fixes grammatical errors in text.
commands.scenario: When you want to ensure your email is error-free.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Turns a list into a coherent paragraph.
commands.scenario: When you need a narrative instead of bullet points.

commands.command: Create a pros and cons list
commands.description: Generates a list of advantages and disadvantages.

commands.command: Summarise this email in one sentence
commands.description: Condenses an email into a single sentence.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of an email.

commands.command: Generate a creative story from this prompt
commands.description: Creates a short story based on a given prompt.
commands.scenario: When you want to entertain or practice storytelling.

commands.command: Find similar articles to this
commands.description: Searches for articles related to the given text.
commands.scenario: When researching a topic and need more sources.

commands.command: Convert this paragraph into bullet points
commands.description: Breaks down a paragraph into key bullet points.
commands.scenario: When you need to present information clearly.

commands.command: Generate a catchy headline for this text
commands.description: Creates an engaging headline.
commands.scenario: When you need a title for your article or blog post.

commands.command: Summarise this book chapter
commands.description: Provides a summary of a book chapter.
commands.scenario: When you need to review a chapter quickly.

commands.command: Turn this text into a social media caption with emojis
commands.description: Transforms long-form content into engaging, bite-sized posts optimized for platforms like Instagram or X (Twitter).

commands.command: Extract all dates and action items from this text
commands.description: Scans through messy notes or long emails to pull out specific deadlines and tasks into a structured format.

commands.command: Change the tone of this text to be more professional
commands.description: Adjusts the vocabulary and structure of a draft to make it suitable for workplace communication or formal settings.

commands.command: Create a quiz based on this information
commands.description: Generates multiple-choice or true/false questions from a provided text to help with studying or testing knowledge.

commands.command: Draft a polite response to this message
commands.description: Analyzes an incoming message and suggests a courteous and appropriate reply to save time on correspondence.

commands.command: Rewrite this text in the style of [Famous Person/Author]
commands.description: Mimics the unique voice, vocabulary, and sentence structure of a specific historical figure or well-known writer.

commands.command: Create a table comparing [Topic A] and [Topic B]
commands.description: Organizes complex information into a structured grid format for easy side-by-side comparison.

commands.command: Identify the main sentiment and emotional tone of this text
commands.description: Analyzes whether the writing is positive, negative, neutral, angry, or joyful to help understand subtext.

commands.command: Turn this text into a script for a [YouTube video/TikTok/Podcast]
commands.description: Converts static information into a conversational, engaging dialogue format suitable for audio or video content.

commands.command: Suggest 5 counter-arguments to the claims made in this text
commands.description: Acts as a devil's advocate to help you strengthen your own arguments or prepare for debates.
